description: Cloud file storage for documents, spreadsheets, presentations, and more
capabilities: Full-text search across all file types
limitations: Large files (>25MB) may need chunked reading
Some file types have limited text extraction
Rate limits apply to bulk operations

common_locations.okrs: Often in Planning or Strategy folders
common_locations.handbooks: Often in HR or People Ops folders
common_locations.technical_docs: Often in Engineering or Product folders

search_tips: Use quotes for exact phrase matches
Filter by file type with 'type:document' or 'type:spreadsheet'
